answer: Florida purchase escrow disbursement reconciliation was overstated in September 2026 for FNF National Title closings because the settlement_disbursement_recon_v3 pipeline incorrectly joined party_identity_bridge using normalized_tax_id, which matched multiple buyer and seller party roles within the same closing, causing duplicate escrow disbursements in finance.disbursement_recon_daily. The fix is to use closing_party_role_id as the join key.

facts.affected_segment: Florida purchase closings for FNF National Title
facts.remediation: Switch the transform to closing_party_role_id, quarantine normalized_tax_id joins in reconciliation workloads, and backfill Florida purchase closings for FNF National Title
facts.root_cause: settlement_disbursement_recon_v3 pipeline joined party_identity_bridge by normalized_tax_id, which matched multiple buyer and seller party roles inside the same closing, duplicating escrow disbursements
